name: HARMONIC INC.
business: We are a leading global provider of broadband access solutions that enable broadband operators to more efficiently and effectively deploy high-speed internet for data, voice and video services for their customers. Our Broadband business provides broadband access solutions and related services, including our cOS software-based broadband access solution, to broadband operators globally. We derived approximately 89% of our revenue from the Americas in 2025.

exposures.sentence: Our Broadband business provides broadband access solutions and related services, including our cOS software-based broadband access solution, to broadband operators globally.
